venues.name: Bay Club Walnut Creek
venues.netType: Portable nets (tape lines laid on multi-purpose court)
venues.hours: Club hours: Mon–Fri 5:00am–9:30pm, Sat–Sun 6:00am–8:00pm (general facility hours; pickleball-specific court hours not separately stated)
venues.weather: Warmer, sunnier inland-valley conditions than the flatland East Bay cities
venues.notes: Membership-only club (part of Renaissance Walnut Creek Hotel complex). Fee amount beyond membership not stated by any source found. googleMapsUrl left null — only a Google place_id (ChIJYeXI8wthhYAR1HQJDgtpP2o) was found via Waze, not a numeric cid, and WebFetch on maps.google.com is blocked.

venues.name: Walnut Creek Tennis Center
venues.surface: Outdoor asphalt, dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.weather: Warmer, sunnier inland-valley conditions than the flatland East Bay cities

conflicts.pickleheads: Walk-up — Pickleheads explicitly states courts cannot be reserved

venues.notes: Matches existing baseline entry 'Heather Farm Park — Walnut Creek Tennis Center' (id: heather-farm-park-walnut-creek-tennis-center) by exact street address (1751 Heather Dr, Walnut Creek, CA 94598 — zip independently confirmed). Pickleheads fills in the existing null 'courts' field (2) with no contradiction there. However Pickleheads states reservations are not available at all, while the baseline record has reservable:'Mixed' plus a live bookingUrl (lifetimeactivities.com/walnut-creek/pickleball/) — left as an unresolved conflict rather than picking a side; the existing bookingUrl may be a drop-in fee/registration link rather than a court-time reservation system, which would reconcile the two, but that is not confirmed. lat/lon reused from the matched baseline venues.json entry since the address match is exact. googleMapsUrl left null — only a Google place_id (ChIJjW17oK1hhYARYMXxbkdtaqk) was found, not a numeric cid; not the same as baseline's non-cid coordinate-search URL, so left null per the cid-only rule rather than falling back to a worse format.

venues.name: Tice Valley Gym
venues.address: 2055 Tice Valley Blvd, Walnut Creek, CA 94595
venues.price: $7 per session (one-time fee, per Pickleheads); note some other sources cite $8/session or $70 for a 10-visit Sports Pass — see notes
venues.hours: Mon–Thu 10am–3pm for drop-in pickleball (some sources say 10am–2pm — see notes)
venues.weather: Warmer, sunnier inland-valley conditions than the flatland East Bay cities
venues.notes: Fee and hours vary slightly across sources: Pickleheads and tennispickleballcalifornia.com say $7 one-time fee; the official Walnut Creek Arts + Rec pickleball page says $8/session or $70 for a 10-visit Sports Pass (that page's fee may apply Arts+Rec-wide rather than being Tice Valley-specific, or may reflect a later fee update). Drop-in hours are given as both 10am–2pm and 10am–3pm, Mon–Thu, across different sources — could not resolve which is current. googleMapsUrl's cid was derived by converting the hex place ID (0x2b903b39dc3acb0) embedded in a live Google Maps URL surfaced via search to decimal — WebFetch on maps.google.com itself is blocked, so this was not independently re-verified by loading the page.

venues.name: Rudgear Park
venues.surface: Outdoor concrete, dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets
venues.price: Free ($2 ball donation requested for non-members)
venues.weather: Warmer, sunnier inland-valley conditions than the flatland East Bay cities
venues.notes: Matches existing baseline entry exactly by name and address; no field Pickleheads states contradicts the baseline, and no previously-null field was filled in. Pickleheads describes the surface simply as 'outdoor concrete' vs. the baseline's more detailed 'Dura 40 surface' description — not a contradiction, just less detail. lat/lon and googleMapsUrl carried from the matched baseline venues.json/courts-data.json entries (address-confirmed, not independently re-geocoded).

venues.name: Rossmoor
venues.address: 1001 Golden Rain Rd, Walnut Creek, CA 94595
venues.surface: Concrete, dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets (3 outdoor, 3 indoor per Pickleheads)
venues.price: Membership required (tied to Rossmoor residency/HOA; no separate per-visit court fee stated)
venues.hours: Not specified — schedule varies by court site, see rossmoorpickleball.net
venues.weather: Warmer, sunnier inland-valley conditions than the flatland East Bay cities
venues.notes: 55+ age-restricted community; access requires residency/membership, not a standalone drop-in fee. Court count is genuinely uncertain: Pickleheads states 6 concrete courts (3 outdoor + 3 indoor), but rossmoorpickleball.net describes current play as 3 outdoor Creekside Courts plus 2 shared indoor courts at the Tice Creek Fitness Center (5 total), with a new 6-court outdoor facility behind the Event Center scheduled to open summer 2026 — the Pickleheads figure may reflect the post-expansion count rather than what's playable today. Left confirmed:false pending clarification. Note this venue name/city combination also exists as an unrelated NJ facility ('Rossmoor Golf Club') on Pickleheads — confirmed the CA/walnut-creek URL specifically before using it. Address given (1001 Golden Rain Rd) is Rossmoor's main Gateway complex address, not a confirmed address for the Creekside Courts themselves, which are described only as being on Rossmoor Parkway — no more precise address or coordinates were found, so lat/lon are left null with approxLocation:true rather than guessed.
